name: Welo Data
summary: Human-in-the-loop AI data labeling and rating.
whyFit: Useful only as short-term cash or AI-labeling exposure; below your strategic operating level.
reviewSummary: Mixed consistency reports; flexible schedule but inconsistent hours common.
approach: Only pursue if immediate cash buffer needed; minimal-time application.

name: shopware AG
summary: European ecommerce platform with strong technical infrastructure focus.
whyFit: Best if positioned toward GTM/AI operations bridge rather than deep infra engineering.
reviewSummary: Generally positive engineering culture signals; role likely technically strict.
approach: Pitch operator value: AI adoption + revenue systems + cross-functional execution.

name: Mitre Media
summary: Tech media and community platform with senior engineering hiring.
whyFit: Roles target deep software engineering leadership, not your strongest lane.
reviewSummary: Role quality may be good, but mismatch risk is high.
approach: Skip now; re-engage only if GTM/RevOps role appears.

name: Lemon.io
summary: Developer marketplace connecting startups with senior dev talent.
whyFit: Strong platform but role requires hands-on senior coding depth.
reviewSummary: Good remote flexibility reputation; strong competition.
approach: Skip for now; focus on RevOps/GTM targets.

name: Clipboard Health
summary: Healthcare staffing marketplace for facilities and clinicians.
whyFit: Operationally feasible but likely under-leverages your systems-builder ceiling.
reviewSummary: Fast-paced support environment signals; growth stage intensity.
approach: Only pursue as bridge role if immediate stability needed.
